title: BIS Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 20 Section Officer Posts
description: The Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) has declared the latest job notification for the recruitment of 20 Section Officer Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the Post Graduation, MBA, and Diploma can grab this chance and apply for the BIS Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salarystructure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply on or before the last date of application. If you are ...
